title: Completion Requirements for Telegram Bots
overall_goal: To set up and configure the necessary Telegram bots for receiving orders and sending system notifications within the Linko POS Desktop environment.
rag_description: This section details the prerequisites for integrating Telegram functionality with Linko POS. It covers the process of establishing two distinct bots: one dedicated to receiving incoming customer orders and another for broadcasting system notifications. Additionally, it addresses the technical configuration (Configs) required to link these bots to the POS system. By completing these steps, businesses can automate order ingestion and maintain real-time awareness of system activities through Telegram.

content.description: The initial phase involves understanding the general requirements for creating a Telegram bot to be used with the system.
Establish a Telegram bot that will act as the primary interface for receiving and processing customer orders.
Set up a separate Telegram bot specifically designated for delivering system alerts and operational notifications to the user or staff.
Access the configuration settings to input the bot tokens and parameters required for the bots to communicate correctly with the Linko POS Desktop software.
